profile.name: Bryan Chan
profile.headline: Designing and building functional web experiences with product clarity.
profile.description: I’m Bryan Chan, a developer focused on interfaces that feel sharp, responsive, and intentionally composed—bridging modern frontend engineering, thoughtful UX, and production-ready execution.

philosophy: Currently crafting web experiences with stronger visual systems, section choreography, and high-fidelity interaction design.

capabilities.title: Interface Engineering
capabilities.description: Modern web applications built with durable component architecture, clean interaction states, and performance in mind.

capabilities.title: Product Experience
capabilities.description: Translating abstract ideas into intuitive page flows, information hierarchy, and polished visual rhythm.

capabilities.title: Delivery Discipline
capabilities.description: From prototyping to implementation, I keep scope clear, move deliberately, and optimize for shippable outcomes.

all.note: Interactive logic, maintainable patterns, modern tooling

all.note: Service wiring, auth-aware features, pragmatic backend support

projects.title: Dagangly
projects.description: Dagangly is a comprehensive, multi-platform e-commerce ecosystem designed to connect local buyers with Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs/UMKM). The platform provides robust tools for sellers to manage their business, automate workflows, and reach customers, while offering buyers a highly accessible, modern, and secure shopping experience.

items: Features: PWA Support, Responsive Design, Accessibility-First
Features: Google Maps, Firebase Push Notifications, Biometrics
Storage: AWS S3 / Cloudinary for persistent uploads

projects.title: Delphi Nexus
projects.description: Delphi Nexus is a futuristic, cyberpunk-themed monitoring dashboard designed for real-time intelligence gathering. It provides a centralized hub for tracking everything from global news and cybersecurity threats to aerospace launches and solar weather.

projects.title: PDF Forge
projects.description: A powerful, open-source web application for manipulating PDF files. Merge, split, organize, compress, and more - all in your browser with a privacy-focused backend.
